title: RESTORATION HOUSE - 211info
text: RESTORATION HOUSE RESTORATION HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing services. Guests will have access to case management, job readiness training and placement assistance, life skills classes, relapse prevention, mental health supports, and faith-based guidance. Individuals who have completed the program may be referred to long term rehousing re-entry services. 650 Locust Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older with any criminal history Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 363-2805 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 363-2805 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Services: Ex-Offender Halfway Houses Ex-Offender Reentry Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
